The fast charging system comprises a lithium battery system, a battery management system and a vehicle-mounted charging device. The lithium battery system includes a lithium battery and a battery heating system; the output terminal of thevehicle-mounted charging device is connected with the lithium battery system and the battery management system and the input terminal is connected with an external power supply. The battery managementsystem is used for monitoring, managing and protecting the lithium battery and is in communication connection with the vehicle-mounted charging device to control a charging voltage and a charging current. The lithium battery management system carries out fault grading according to a total voltage, a charging current and a single voltage, detected in real time, of the lithium battery and carries out power limiting or charging stopping controlling on the vehicle-mounted charging device according to the fault grade. column6: Method and system for monitoring health condition of lithium ion battery in fast charge cycle process
column7: The invention relates to a method and a system for monitoring the health condition of a lithium ion battery in a fast charge cycle process. The method for monitoring the health condition of the lithium ion battery in the fast charge cycle process comprises the following steps of: placing a three-electrode lithium ion battery at a preset constant temperature and charging and discharging at a set charging and discharging rate; and the lithium precipitation state of the battery is judged according to the change trend of the negative electrode to the reference potential in the charging process, so that the health condition monitoring in the rapid charging cycle process of the lithium ion battery is realized. The lithium precipitation information of the battery is obtained by monitoring the potential of the reference electrode, that is, the chemical process is digitalized and digitized, and the ultimate target is to apply proper charge-discharge multiplying power under the condition of designing batteries with different charge states, so that the lithium precipitation is effectively avoided or relieved.

column6: Lithium battery fast charging flow calibration method

By applying the embodiment of the invention, the lithium precipitation boundary current under two dimensions of SOC and temperature can be obtained.

column6: Fast charging method for lithium-ion power battery with temperature compensation
column7: The invention provides a fast charging method for a lithium-ion power battery with temperature compensation, and relates to the technical field of lithium-ion batteries, in particular to a fast charging method for a lithium-ion power battery. The optimal charging strategy is provided when the battery states of charge and the battery temperatures are different. The method comprises the following steps: detecting the state of charge SOC of a to-be-charged battery; comparing the SOC which is obtained by detection with a charging capacity threshold SOC0; when SOC is smaller than or equal to SOC0, detecting the temperature T of the to-be-charged battery, calculating charging current of the to-be-charged battery, carrying out constant-current charging on the to-be-charged battery, and collecting the SOC of the battery in the charging process in real time; when SOC is greater than SOC0, carrying out constant-voltage charging on the battery, wherein the charging voltage value is U0, comparing the charging current I with charging cutoff current Imin, if I is greater than Imin, continuously carrying out constant-voltage charging; and if I is smaller than Imin, finishing charging of the lithium-ion power battery. The fast charging method is suitable for charging the lithium-ion power battery.

column6: Rapid charging method of lithium ion battery

The lithium precipitation boundary window of the lithium ion battery to be charged is obtained by using the three-electrode battery, and then the rapid step charging strategy is designed for the lithium precipitation boundary window; the rapid step charging strategy canenable a charging curve in the whole charging process of the battery to meet three Malus laws as far as possible, namely, can enable a charging current to be close to the optimal charging curve as much as possible; and the polarization phenomenon of the battery is controlled, so that the lithium precipitation phenomenon of the battery in charging is avoided, the charging time is shortened, the safety is improved, the service life of the battery is prolonged, and the battery is effectively protected.

The sodium ion battery positive electrode composite material comprises a layered oxide and a sodium orthophosphate ion material layer coated on the surface of the layered oxide. According to the sodium-ion battery positive electrode composite material, the surface of the layered oxide is coated with the sodium-rich sodium orthophosphate ion material layer, the surface of the layered material is protected, the capacity fading rate of a sodium-ion battery positive electrode in the circulation process is reduced, and the circulation stability of a sodium-ion battery is improved.
column8: NAYUAN NEW MATERIAL TECH WUXI CO LTD

column6: Method for preparing sodium-ion battery negative electrode from bamboo wood and sodium-ion battery negative electrode
column7: The invention relates to the technical field of sodium-ion battery negative electrodes, in particular to a method for preparing a sodium-ion battery negative electrode from bamboo wood and the sodium-ion battery negative electrode. The hydroxyl-containing benzothiazole is introduced into the sodium ion battery negative electrode, so that the prepared sodium ion negative electrode has relatively high thermal stability and chemical stability; in addition, due to the addition of benzothiazole, a nitrogen-sulfur heterocyclic ring can be introduced into the negative electrode of the sodium-ion battery, so that the first-circle coulombic efficiency (ICE) and the cycling stability of the battery are improved; in addition, a titanium oxide precursor is introduced during preparation, so that the cycling stability of the sodium-ion battery is greatly enhanced, and the service life of the sodium-ion battery is prolonged. And finally, the bamboo wood is used as a carbon source of the negative electrode of the sodium-ion battery, so that the sodium-ion battery is more environment-friendly compared with a traditional petroleum-based material, the dependence on fossil fuel is reduced, and the added value of the bamboo wood is improved to a greater extent.

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode material and preparation method thereof, positive electrode and sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention provides a sodium ion battery positive electrode material and a preparation method thereof, a positive electrode and a sodium ion battery. The sodium ion battery positive electrode material comprises a sodium-containing layered oxide and a coating layer coating the surface of the sodium-containing layered oxide, the coating layer is a polyanion sodium-containing compound with an NASICON crystal structure, and the polyanion sodium-containing compound comprises sodium and transition metal elements; wherein the total residual sodium content of the sodium ion battery positive electrode material is 2.4-4.2 wt% of the mass of the sodium ion battery positive electrode material. Less residual alkali (the content of sodium hydroxide and sodium carbonate) is beneficial for improving the processability of the sodium ion battery positive electrode material during homogenate coating. The coating layer with the NASICON fast-conduction sodium ion conductor structure can improve the surface stability of the material, and finally, the sodium ion battery adopting the sodium ion battery positive electrode material has excellent rate capability, cycle performance and other electrical properties.
column9: BIE XIAOFEI;;ZHAI XIMIN;;YANG HEJIE;;GAO TIANYI;;YANG JINGBO;;JIANG TAO;;SUN HUANLI

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode mixed material, pole piece, slurry and preparation method
column7: The invention provides a sodium ion battery positive electrode mixed material, a pole piece, slurry and a preparation method. The sodium ion battery positive electrode mixed material comprises a binder, a conductive additive and a sodium ion battery active material, wherein the binder is SEBS (styrene-ethylene-butylene-styrene) rubber. According to the sodium-ion battery positive electrode mixed material, the SEBS rubber is adopted as a binder to prepare a sodium-ion battery positive electrode plate, and the sodium-ion battery positive electrode mixed material has alkali resistance and oxidation resistance by utilizing the chemical stability of the SEBS rubber and the stability of solvent oil during slurry preparation. Sodium-ion battery positive electrode slurry prepared from the sodium-ion battery positive electrode mixed material has the advantages of good fluidity, good stability, small viscosity change and the like; and the defect that in the preparation process of the existing sodium ion battery positive electrode slurry, the PVDF binder is very easy to react with a strong alkaline substance on the surface of a sodium ion battery material to cause denaturation and failure of the positive electrode slurry is avoided.
column8: GUANGZHOU GREAT POWER ENERGY & TECH CO LTD

column6: Low-sodium-phase sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, preparation method thereof and sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention provides a preparation method of a low-sodium-phase sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, which comprises the following steps: sealing and heating a layered sodium metal oxide positive electrode material and XPF6, carrying out etching treatment on the surface of the positive electrode material by XPF6 decomposition gas to construct a protective film, and then carrying out electrochemical sodium removal treatment on the surface-modified sodium-ion battery positive electrode material to control the sodium content. Therefore, the stable low-sodium-phase sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is formed, and the cycle performance of the obtained low-sodium-phase sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is obviously improved. The invention also provides the low-sodium-phase sodium-ion battery positive electrode material prepared by the preparation method and a sodium-ion battery based on the low-sodium-phase sodium-ion battery positive electrode material.

column6: Sodium supplementation method for negative electrode of sodium-ion battery and sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a sodium supplementation method for a negative electrode of a sodium-ion battery and the sodium-ion battery. The method includes the following steps: in an inert atmosphere, melting solid metal sodium at a certain temperature to obtain liquid metal sodium; uniformly adding the liquid metal sodium to the surface of a negative electrode plate to ensure that the liquid metal sodium penetrates into a gap between negative electrode materials of the negative electrode plate; and drying the negative electrode plate. According to the sodium supplementation method for the negative electrode of the sodium-ion battery and the sodium-ion battery, provided by the invention, metal sodium is uniformly added to the surface of the negative electrode plate after being melted in the inert atmosphere, so that sodium supplementation can be implemented on the sodium-ion battery simply and efficiently, the problem of low initial coulombic efficiency of the sodium-ion battery can be solved, the overall energy density of the sodium-ion battery can be improved, and no negative effects on the sodium-ion battery can occur.

column6: Recycling method of sodium ion battery positive electrode
column7: The invention belongs to the technical field of recovery of waste sodium-ion battery positive electrodes, and discloses a sodium-ion battery positive electrode recycling method, which comprises the following steps: screening, evaluating, pretreating, disassembling and separating waste sodium-ion batteries; cleaning and drying the sodium vanadium phosphate positive plate, and storing the positive plate or stripping and collecting a positive electrode material; quantitatively analyzing the content of each element in the positive electrode material, and calculating the missing amount of sodium ions in the positive electrode material; performing sodium-supplementing repair on the pole piece or the positive electrode material; assembling the repaired positive electrode and a fresh negative electrode into a new sodium ion battery; the sodium-ion battery is used as a brand-new sodium-ion battery after being subjected to liquid injection and formation operation. According to the method, the sodium ion positive electrode material is subjected to sodium supplement repair by adopting two methods of electrochemical sodium supplement and chemical sodium supplement, so that the capacity and the working voltage of the positive electrode of the waste sodium ion battery are recovered, and the repaired positive electrode is re-applied to a new sodium ion battery device, so that the utilization rate of the material is greatly improved.
column8: CHENGDU NACHENG XINNENG TECH CO LTD

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode precursor, sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, preparation method of sodium-ion battery positive electrode material and sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention relates to the technical field of sodium-ion battery positive electrode materials, in particular to a sodium-ion battery positive electrode precursor, a sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, a preparation method of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode precursor and the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material and a sodium-ion battery. The sodium ion battery positive electrode precursor has a core-shell structure, the core of the core-shell structure is a nickel-iron-manganese ternary precursor, and the shell of the core-shell structure is a copper oxide layer; the chemical formula of the nickel-iron-manganese ternary precursor is Ni < x > Fe < y > Mn < z > (OH) < 2 >, xlt; 1, 0lt; yt; Yt; 1, 0lt; zlt, zlt; x + y + z = 1; the nickel-iron-manganese ternary precursor comprises at least one of the following characteristics: D10 = 1.8-3.5 [mu] m; d50 is equal to 3.0 to 5.5 [mu] m; d90 is equal to 5.0 to 7.0 [mu] m; the tap density is 1.3-1.6 g/cm < 3 >; and the specific surface area is 10-20m < 2 >/g. The sodium ion battery positive electrode precursor is doped with the Cu element, so that the air stability is improved, and the capacity is improved.

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, preparation method thereof, sodium-ion battery and electric equipment
column7: The invention discloses a sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, a preparation method thereof, a sodium-ion battery and electric equipment, and belongs to the technical field of sodium-ion battery materials. The sodium ion battery positive electrode material provided by the invention comprises a secondary particle composed of a plurality of primary particles, and the cross section of the secondary particle comprises strip-shaped holes arranged along the circumferential direction. The sodium-ion battery positive electrode material provided by the invention has a special morphology, the contact area between the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material and an electrode solution can be increased through the special morphology, the structure is stable and not prone to collapse, and a sodium-ion battery prepared from the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material has good electrochemical performance.

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, preparation method thereof and sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a sodium ion battery positive electrode material which is of a core-shell structure and sequentially comprises a titanium monoxide core, a sodium ferric sulfate porous wrapping layer and a carbon wrapping layer from inside to outside. The invention also discloses a preparation method of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material and a sodium-ion battery prepared from the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material. The sodium ion battery positive electrode material provided by the invention solves the problem of poor electronic conductivity of a polyanionic positive electrode material in the existing sodium ion battery.

column6: Formation method of sodium ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a formation method of a sodium ion battery, which comprises the following steps: S1, connecting the positive electrode of the sodium ion battery to be formed with the negative electrode of a formation cabinet, and connecting the negative electrode of the sodium ion battery to be formed with the positive electrode of the formation cabinet; s2, performing first constant-current charging on the sodium ion battery according to preset first formation temperature, first formation pressure, first charging current and first cut-off voltage; s3, after the first constant current charging of the sodium ion battery is completed, connecting the positive electrode of the sodium ion battery subjected to the first constant current charging with the positive electrode of the formation cabinet, and connecting the negative electrode of the sodium ion battery with the negative electrode of the formation cabinet; and S4, carrying out second constant current charging on the sodium ion battery according to a preset second formation temperature, a preset second formation pressure, a preset second charging current and a preset second cut-off voltage. Stable SEI films can be constructed on the surfaces of the positive electrode and the negative electrode of the sodium-ion battery respectively, so that the cycle life of the sodium-ion battery can be prolonged.

column6: Positive electrode material for sodium ion battery and preparation method of positive electrode material
column7: The invention discloses a positive electrode material for a sodium ion battery and a preparation method of the positive electrode material. The positive electrode material is one of iron manganese copper acid sodium or iron manganese nickel acid sodium. The preparation method of the positive electrode material for the sodium-ion battery comprises a preparation method when the positive electrode material is sodium ferrimanganate cuprate and a preparation method when the positive electrode material is sodium ferrimanganate nickelate. The invention relates to the technical field of sodium-ion batteries. According to the positive electrode material for the sodium-ion battery and the preparation method, a metal oxide material can be replaced by a sodium ferrimanganate cuprate or sodium ferrimanganate nickelate material, so that the conductivity of the whole positive electrode material is obviously improved, and the purpose that the conductivity of the whole positive electrode material is greatly improved by using sodium ferrimanganate cuprate and sodium ferrimanganate nickelate as the positive electrode material is well achieved. The sodium-ion battery has better stability, the conductivity of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is greatly improved, the situation that the volume of the battery positive electrode material is seriously changed during long-term use is avoided, and the sodium-ion battery is greatly convenient to popularize and use by people.
column8: ZHEJIANG HUANA NEW ENERGY CO LTD

column6: Sodium ion battery negative electrode material, sodium ion battery and preparation method of sodium ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a sodium-ion battery negative electrode material, a sodium-ion battery and a preparation method of the sodium-ion battery, and the method comprises the following steps: dissolving a sulfur source and an antimony source in a solvent, putting the obtained solution into a homogeneous reactor, carrying out primary heating, and carrying out a reaction to prepare Sb2S3 nanorods;dispersing the Sb2S3 nanorods in alcohol, adding titanium salt, controlling the system to be neutral or weakly alkaline, then performing secondary heating, and performing a reaction to prepare Sb2S3-TiO2; adding Sb2S3-TiO2 and dopamine hydrochloride into Tirs buffer solution, performing complete stirring, taking solids, making the solids into powder, performing calcining in an inert gas atmosphere, reducing carbon, and wrapping the surface of Sb2S3-TiO2 with carbon, and obtaining the negative electrode material of the sodium ion battery on the surface of TiO2. The sodium ion battery negative electrode material provided by the invention not only enhances the structural stability of the material and inhibits volume expansion, but also improves the electrical conductivity of the material, sothat the cycling stability and the rate capability of the material are improved.

column6: Sodium ion battery positive electrode active material, sodium ion battery positive electrode material, sodium ion battery positive electrode, sodium ion battery and preparation method thereof
column7: The invention provides a sodium-ion battery positive electrode active material, a sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, a sodium-ion battery positive electrode, a sodium-ion battery and a preparation method thereof, and relates to the technical field of sodium-ion battery positive electrode active materials. The sodium-ion battery positive electrode active material comprises Na2Fe (C2O4)(SO4). 2H2O; technical problems that the existing layered oxide and an organic positive electrode active material cannot meet the requirements of high theoretical capacity and ideal structural stability of the sodium ion battery at the same time are solved. The Na2Fe (C2O4) (SO4). 2H2O provided by the invention is used as a positive electrode active material, so that the sodium-ion battery is notrestricted by lithium resources and can be developed for a long time; the theoretical capacity and the cycling stability are more ideal, and the electrochemical performance is more excellent.

column6: SODIUM ION STORAGE MATERIAL
column7: The present invention relates to a sodium ion storage material, and an electrode material for a sodium ion battery, an electrode material for a seawater battery, an electrode for a sodium ion battery,an electrode for a seawater battery, a sodium ion battery, and a seawater battery, each of which contains the sodium ion storage material. Specifically, the present invention is characterized by a sodium ion storage material comprising at least one material selected from the group consisting of CuxS, FeS, FeS2, Ni3S, NbS2, SbOx, SbSx, SnS, and SnS2 (wherein 0 < x <= 2). The use of the sodium ionstorage material according to the present invention can maintain high discharge capacity and the application of the sodium ion storage material to a sodium ion battery as a secondary battery can showexcellent charge and discharge cycle characteristics.
column9: YUK JONG MIN;;PARK JAE YEOL;;KIM SUNG JOO

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode sodium pre-modification method and sodium-ion battery positive electrode subjected to sodium pre-modification
column7: The invention provides a sodium ion battery positive electrode sodium pre-modification method and a sodium ion battery positive electrode subjected to sodium pre-modification. The sodium-ion battery positive electrode sodium pre-modification method comprises the following steps: mixing an organic sodium solution with a carbon source in an inert atmosphere to obtain organic sodium gel; and mixing the organic gel with the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material in an inert atmosphere, and obtaining the sodium-pre-modified sodium-ion battery positive electrode after the reaction is finished. A chemical reaction pre-sodium modification method is adopted, the sodium-ion battery positive electrode and the organic sodium gel react to obtain the sodium-rich or over-sodium-rich positive electrode, the half-battery first-cycle charge-discharge specific capacity is remarkably improved, the battery energy density is remarkably improved, the cycle life is remarkably prolonged, and the method has wide research prospects and application value.

column6: Positive pole piece of sodium ion battery and sodium ion battery
column7: The invention provides a sodium-ion battery positive pole piece and a sodium-ion battery, and belongs to the technical field of sodium-ion batteries, the sodium-ion battery positive pole piece comprises a positive active material layer and a positive current collector, the positive active material layer is located on one side or two sides of the current collector, the positive electrode active material layer comprises a positive electrode active material, a conductive agent, a binder and an additive A, and the structural formula of the additive A is as shown in a formula I and a formula II. The positive electrode piece of the sodium-ion battery can improve the positive electrode processing performance of the sodium-ion battery, improve the high-temperature cycle of the sodium-ion battery and prolong the high-temperature storage life of the sodium-ion battery.

column6: Sodium ion composite positive electrode material, preparation method and application thereof, sodium ion battery positive electrode plate and sodium ion battery
column7: The invention relates to the technical field of sodium-ion batteries, in particular to a sodium-ion composite positive electrode material, a preparation method and application thereof, a sodium-ion battery positive electrode plate and a sodium-ion battery. The sodium ion composite positive electrode material has a multi-layer composite structure and comprises a sodium ion positive electrode material with a core-shell structure and graphene coating the sodium ion positive electrode material with the core-shell structure, the sodium ion positive electrode material with the core-shell structure comprises an inner core and an outer shell coating the inner core, the core is a P2-type sodium ion positive electrode material, and the shell is a tunnel-type sodium ion positive electrode material. The composite positive electrode material has good air stability, high structural stability and excellent electrochemical performance; the sodium ion composite positive electrode material is applied to the sodium ion battery, so that the sodium ion battery has the advantages of long service life, short charging time, high safety and the like.

column7: The invention provides a sodium ion battery positive electrode slurry, a sodium ion battery and a preparation method thereof, the sodium ion battery positive electrode slurry is prepared by uniformly mixing and stirring a nickel iron sodium manganate layered oxide, a carbon nanotube conductive agent, polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and N-methyl pyrrolidone as a solvent according to a certain mass percentage, and a positive electrode plate; according to the sodium ion battery and the positive electrode slurry thereof, any acid inhibitor does not need to be additionally and independently added into the slurry, only low humidity and slurry coating time need to be controlled, gelation agglomeration of the slurry can be prevented, and the consistency of the coating surface density of the positive electrode slurry and the consistency of the sodium ion battery are ensured. Operation is simple, circulation is stable, and popularization is easy.

column6: Positive electrode material for sodium ion battery and sodium ion battery comprising positive electrode material
column7: The invention provides a positive electrode material for a sodium ion battery and the sodium ion battery comprising the positive electrode material. The positive electrode material comprises a positive electrode active material, a binder, a conductive agent and a sodium supplement additive. Compared with the prior art, the positive electrode material has the following advantages that the added sodium supplement additive is a sodium compound so as not to change the positive electrode potential, and can be decomposed only during formation charging, gas generated after decomposition can be removed during formation, the generated sodium is transferred from a positive electrode to a negative electrode during charging, an SEI film is formed on the negative electrode, and sodium needed for forming the SEI film is filled, so that consumption of positive electrode sodium ions can be reduced, the irreversible capacity of the sodium-ion battery can be reduced, the first coulombic efficiency of the sodium-ion battery is improved, and the cycle performance of the sodium-ion battery is improved. According to the invention, the sodium ion battery sodium ion compensation method provided by the invention is safe, practical and convenient to operate.

column6: Sodium ion battery and sodium ion electrode preparation process
column7: The invention belongs to the technical field of batteries, and particularly relates to a sodium ion battery and a sodium ion electrode preparation process. column6: Symmetrical sodium ion battery and preparation method thereof
column7: In order to overcome the problem of slow sodium ion diffusion of an existing symmetrical sodium ion battery, the invention provides a symmetrical sodium ion battery. The symmetrical sodium ion battery comprises a positive electrode, a negative electrode and an electrolyte, the positive electrode and the negative electrode are arranged in the electrolyte, the positive electrode comprises a positive electrode material, the negative electrode comprises a negative electrode material, Active materials of the positive electrode material and the negative electrode material comprise sodium alum pyrophosphate shown in a general formula Na < 7 +/-x > V < 3 +/-y > (P2O7) 4, and x is greater than or equal to 0 and less than or equal to 0.5; 0 < = y < = 0.5. column6: Sodium ion battery negative electrode material and preparation method thereof
column7: The invention discloses a sodium ion battery negative electrode material. The sodium ion battery negative electrode material comprises a spherical inner layer and a coating outer layer coating the spherical inner layer. According to the sodium-ion battery negative electrode material provided by the invention, through development of the negative electrode material and silicon-doped titanium dioxide, sodium ions can rapidly pass through the negative electrode material in an actual sodium intercalation and deintercalation process, so that the specific capacity of the sodium-ion battery is prevented from being reduced when the negative electrode material is actually applied to the sodium-ion battery, and the specific capacity of the sodium-ion battery is improved through carbon-coated silicon-doped titanium dioxide. The cycling stability of the negative electrode material is improved; the invention also provides a preparation method of the sodium ion battery negative electrode material, and the sodium ion battery negative electrode material prepared by the method is good in stability, low in cost and high in capacity retention rate.

column6: Sodium ion battery with novel structure and preparation method thereof
column7: The invention relates to the field of sodium ion batteries, in particular to a sodium ion battery with a novel structure and a preparation method thereof. The sodium ion battery is characterized in that a positive electrode, a diaphragm and a negative electrode of the sodium ion battery are of an integrated structure of an interpenetrating network; a negative electrode material, a diaphragm material and a positive electrode material sequentially deposit on or coat the surface of a current collector to form a three-layer laminating structure and are in close interface contact. The sodium ion battery provided by the invention has the benefits that the negative electrode of the sodium ion battery is prepared on the surface of the porous current collector through an electrochemical method, thediaphragm is directly formed on the surface of the negative electrode through a solution immersion method, and a porous structure of the current collector is filled with the positive electrode, so that the novel sodium ion battery with the positive electrode, diaphragm and negative electrode inter-penetrating structure is obtained; the positive electrode, the negative electrode and the diaphragmof the sodium ion battery are integrated, an internal structure and an assembly process of the battery are simplified, and the interface contact characteristic of the electrodes and the diaphragm is improved; the sodium ion battery prepared with the preparation method has the advantages of being excellent in comprehensive performance, easy for large-scare and large-size production and the like.

column6: High-cycle stable sodium ion battery and preparation method and application thereof
column7: The invention belongs to the technical field of sodium-ion batteries, and particularly relates to a high-cycle-stability sodium-ion battery as well as a preparation method and application thereof. The high-cycle-stability sodium-ion battery comprises a self-supporting film positive electrode, a negative electrode plate, a diaphragm and an electrolyte, the preparation materials of the self-supporting thin film positive electrode comprise sodium ion layered oxide and metal oxide. The self-supporting film electrode is used as the positive electrode of the sodium-ion battery, a current collector does not need to be used, and the content ratio of active substances in the battery is high. The energy density of the sodium ion layered oxide is high, and pre-sodium modification is not needed; the metal oxide has high electrochemical activity and structural stability, and the sodium ion battery positive electrode prepared by compounding the two can provide sufficient cycle life and stability for the sodium ion battery.

column6: Method for optimizing electrode parameters of quick-charging sodium-ion battery and electronic equipment
column7: The invention provides a method for optimizing electrode parameters of a quick-charging sodium-ion battery and electronic equipment. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring electrode parameter historical data of the sodium ion battery; determining battery characteristic parameters capable of simultaneously representing the energy density and the fast charging performance of the sodium ion battery based on the historical data of the electrode parameters; and optimizing the battery characteristic parameters to obtain optimized electrode parameter target data by taking the energy density and the fast charging performance of the sodium-ion battery meeting the preset sodium-ion battery design requirements as a target. According to the method, the theoretical value of the sodium ion battery electrode parameter of which the battery performance meets the design requirement is firstly determined through theoretical calculation, so that only a small amount of experiments are needed to verify the sodium ion battery performance corresponding to the theoretical value, and the design and development period of the sodium ion battery is effectively shortened.

column6: Recycling method of waste sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a waste sodium-ion battery recovery method which comprises the following steps: charging a recovered waste sodium-ion battery, and transferring sodium ions in a positive electrode into a hard carbon negative electrode through an electrolyte in the charging process; the method comprises the following steps: disassembling and sorting the waste sodium-ion battery in a full-charge state to obtain a sodium-removed positive plate, a sodium-containing hard carbon negative plate and a diaphragm; soaking the sodium-containing hard carbon negative electrode plate in a weak acid solution, and filtering to obtain current collector metal, a sodium salt solution and hard carbon; and crushing and screening the sodium-removed positive plate to obtain current collector metal and sodium-free positive electrode powder. According to the method, an electrochemical transfer method is utilized, that is, sodium ions in the positive electrode of the waste sodium-ion battery are transferred to the negative electrode in the charging process, so that the sodium element and other metal elements in the positive electrode of the waste sodium-ion battery are separated, and the efficient recovery of the waste sodium-ion battery is realized.

column6: Method for detecting surface defects of negative electrode of sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a sodium ion battery negative electrode surface defect detection method which comprises the following steps: (1) adding ultraviolet fluorescent powder and an organic solvent into negative electrode slurry, and uniformly mixing the negative electrode slurry; (2) coating a negative electrode current collector with the negative electrode slurry, and drying to obtain a negative electrode plate; (3) assembling the negative plate into the sodium ion battery; and (4) disassembling the sodium-ion battery after operation, observing the surface of the negative electrode of the sodium-ion battery under an ultraviolet lamp, and judging whether surface defects exist or not according to the color. According to the invention, the ultraviolet fluorescent powder is added into the negative electrode slurry to prepare the negative electrode plate, the negative electrode plate is assembled into the sodium ion battery, and the operated sodium ion battery is disassembled, so that whether surface defects exist or not can be judged by observing the surface color of the negative electrode of the sodium ion battery under an ultraviolet lamp.

column6: High-stability sodium ion battery positive electrode material as well as preparation method and application thereof
column7: The invention relates to the field of sodium-ion battery materials, and particularly discloses a high-stability sodium-ion battery positive electrode material as well as a preparation method and application thereof. According to the invention, the positive electrode material of the sodium-ion battery is modified by utilizing a strategy of co-doping a cation and a plurality of anions, so that the high-stability positive electrode material of the sodium-ion battery with a chemical general formula of Na < 1-2x > Ca < x > Ni < 0.6 > Fe < 0.3 > Mn < 0.15 > FaCl < b > N < c > O < 2-(a + b + 3c)/2 is obtained. The high-stability sodium-ion battery positive electrode material provided by the invention has long cycle stability, and the battery specific capacity and the first coulombic efficiency of a sodium-ion battery are effectively improved by utilizing the high-stability sodium-ion battery positive electrode material. The invention effectively solves the problems that the performance improvement of the transition metal cation doped modified sodium ion battery positive electrode material in the prior art is limited, and the long cycle stability of the sodium ion battery cannot be improved.

column6: Three-electrode sodium ion battery and method for acquiring electrochemical model parameters of sodium ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a three-electrode sodium-ion battery and a sodium-ion battery electrochemical model parameter acquisition method. The three-electrode sodium-ion battery comprises an electrode group and a reference electrode, wherein the electrode group consists of a positive electrode, a diaphragm and a negative electrode; the reference electrode adopts a copper wire, the reference electrode is positioned in a reference electrode placement area of the electrode group, one end of the reference electrode is positioned in the sodium ion battery electrode group wrapped by the aluminum-plastic film and is separated from the electrode by a diaphragm, the other end of the reference electrode is led out by the aluminum-plastic film, and the lead-out part of the reference electrode is sealed by a hot melt adhesive. High threshold and storage problems caused by use of pure sodium sheets are avoided, the manufacturing requirement and cost are reduced, the manufacturing and testing safety is improved, and meanwhile, the electrochemical performance key parameters of the sodium ion battery can be effectively obtained based on the three-electrode electric ion battery and serve as electrochemical model parameters of the sodium ion battery.

column6: Electrode material of ion battery as well as preparation method and application of electrode material
column7: The invention discloses an electrode material of an ion battery and a preparation method and application thereof, and belongs to the technical field of battery materials. The electrode material of the ion battery is at least one of vanadium selenide or vanadium selenide composite polyaniline; the electrode material is a sodium ion battery negative electrode active material or an aqueous zinc ion battery positive electrode active material. The invention further provides a specific preparation method of the vanadium selenide or the vanadium selenide composite polyaniline. The prepared electrode material of the ion battery is applied to a negative electrode of a sodium ion battery or a positive electrode of an aqueous zinc ion battery. An electrode prepared from the electrode material of the ion battery provided by the invention is stable in structure in a circulation process when being used as a negative electrode material of a sodium ion battery, and is stable in circulation when being used as a positive electrode material of a zinc ion battery; and the obtained ion battery electrode material can be used as a negative electrode material of a sodium ion battery, can also be used as a positive electrode material of a zinc ion battery, and has a wide application prospect.

column6: Sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, preparation method thereof and sodium-ion battery
column7: The invention discloses a sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, a preparation method thereof and a sodium-ion battery, and belongs to the technical field of sodium-ion batteries. The sodium ion battery positive electrode material comprises a sodium positive electrode layered oxide and a coating layer coating the surface of the sodium positive electrode layered oxide, the coating layer contains a compound formed by a conductive material and Nax1QPOy1, Q comprises at least one of Fe, Ti, V, Mn and Al, x1 is greater than 0 and less than or equal to 2, and y1 is greater than 0 and less than or equal to 4. The sodium ion battery positive electrode material has good structural stability, and can solve or relieve the problems of instability of layered oxide in air, cycle performance degradation and the like. The preparation method comprises the step of forming the coating layer on the surface of the sodium positive electrode layered oxide. The method is simple, easy to operate and suitable for industrial production. When the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is used for preparing a sodium-ion battery, the electrochemical performance of the sodium-ion battery can be improved.

column6: Method for reducing pH value of sodium ion battery positive electrode material and application
column7: The invention provides a method for reducing the pH value of a sodium ion battery positive electrode material. The method comprises the following steps: mixing a certain amount of sodium salt and an organic solvent to obtain a mixed solution; adding a sodium-ion battery positive electrode material to be treated into the mixed solution under the condition that the room temperature is 40-60 DEG C, and stirring for 0.3-48 hours at the speed of 100-800rpm, so as to obtain a turbid liquid; wherein the mass ratio of the sodium salt to the organic solvent to the sodium ion battery positive electrode material to be treated is (0.001-0.5): 1: (1-50); carrying out centrifugal separation on the turbid liquid, and washing once or multiple times by using ethanol; and carrying out vacuum drying on the washed product at 60-120 DEG C to obtain the treated sodium ion battery positive electrode material. According to the method for reducing the pH value of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, the sodium salt and the organic solvent are mixed and used for treating the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material, so that the pH value of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is reduced, the processing performance of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is improved, the cycle life of the sodium-ion battery positive electrode material is prolonged, and the method is suitable for being applied to large-scale industrial production.
